perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with close-up shots of various colorful chrysanthemum bouquets at a Costco warehouse; a female hand enters the frame to point at a bunch of bright pink flowers. (2) The camera transitions to show unique decorative chrysanthemums styled with smiley faces and animal features. (3) Panning shots reveal a wider selection of flowers, including lilies and birds of paradise, followed by a close-up of a price tag showing $239.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a male voice asking a riddle about which flower is the easiest to raise, accompanied by a female voice responding. Ambient supermarket noise, including muffled chatter and the sound of shopping carts, is audible. (2) The male voice delivers a pun-based punchline about chrysanthemums being 'itchy' (a Mandarin pun on 'easy to raise'). (3) The female voice continues narrating her observations of the cute flower arrangements while the background ambient noise remains consistent. No background music is detected.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'Costco Hidden Price: Colorful Chrysanthemums 239 NTD' displayed prominently at the top. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: Variety-show style captions follow the dialogue, including 'Do you know what flower is easiest to raise?' and 'Chrysanthemums itch' with a humorous cross emoji. (3) Functional Text: 'Each bouquet 239 NTD' and concluding text suggesting the flowers are a great deal.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro joke -> Product showcase -> Price reveal

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female character represented by hands, 2 indistinct shoppers visible in the background aisles.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A female shopper whose identity is only revealed through her hands and casual movements while interacting with products.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A warehouse-style supermarket interior featuring high metal shelving, refrigerated floral displays, and typical industrial lighting.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a lifestyle shopping recommendation intended to drive interest in Costco's floral department. It utilizes a comedic pun as an engagement hook to capture attention before showcasing a variety of aesthetically pleasing and unique chrysanthemum arrangements, ultimately concluding with a price point to demonstrate value and encourage a visit to the store.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct highlight of store branding, product pricing, and verbal/textual recommendations of the product's value.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Use of pun-driven dialogue between off-screen narrators and high-density variety-show text overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video relies heavily on the 'hidden' deal framing to create a sense of discovery for the viewer, effectively turning a mundane grocery trip into a piece of entertainment content.
